flashcards.definition: Starting to invest 10 years earlier with less total money can yield MORE than investing 3× more starting later, due to compound interest.
When minimum payments mostly cover interest, causing debt to take decades to pay off and cost multiples of the original amount.
Making only minimum credit card payments extends debt repayment for decades and dramatically increases total cost.
Debt avalanche (highest interest first) saves the most money; debt snowball (smallest balance first) provides psychological wins.
The more frequently interest compounds (daily vs. monthly vs. annually), the more total interest accumulated.
